zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas FitzWilliam於1191年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾洛頓時，他的父親Sir William FitzWilliam17歲，母親Adela de Warenne28歲。他於1210年之前與Mrs- Thomas FitzWilliam在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特洛頓結婚。他去世於1242年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: FitzWilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas FitzWilliam was born in 1191, in Royton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William FitzWilliam, was 17 and his mother, Adela de Warenne, was 28. He married Mrs- Thomas FitzWilliam before 1210, in Royton, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1242, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

ko.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England, United K: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스플로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas FitzWilliam(이)가 1191년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 로이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William FitzWilliam(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Adela de Warenne(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1210년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 로이턴에서 Mrs- Thomas FitzWilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1242년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.
